title: crataegus calpodendron var. obesa
intro: Crataegus calpodendron var. obesa, also known as the thorny elaeagnus or Oregon hawthorn, is a type of hawthorn plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to help lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels due to its high levels of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Crataegus calpodendron var. obesa include its potential to reduce the risk of heart disease, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Crataegus calpodendron var. obesa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
